concerns.text: T017 ('Implement validation logic to halt if core constructs are missing') is semantically insufficient for FR-008. FR-008 mandates the system MUST 'halt' execution. A task describing 'validation logic' does not guarantee the implementation of the specific exit/error-handling mechanism required to stop the pipeline. This is a silent relaxation of a hard constraint.

T016 ('Implement missing data handling... listwise deletion or mean imputation') omits the conditional fallback logic required by FR-009. FR-009 explicitly states: 'If missing covariates... cause a drop >10%, the system MUST proceed with a reduced model'. T016 only covers the deletion/imputation step, failing to capture the mandatory 'reduced model' path, thus weakening the requirement.

T008 ('Setup environment variable management for random seeds') violates Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) by limiting seed control to environment variables. The Constitution and Plan require seeds to be 'pinned in code' for all stochastic steps (DGP, modeling, bootstrapping). Relying solely on env vars allows the code to run non-deterministically if the env is unset, failing the 'reproducible by re-running' test.
